response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong recent alignment: TypeScript/Node.js and React in production, MongoDB and AWS exposure, Docker/Kubernetes deployment, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, which directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, test-runner and assertion library author, Selenium instructor) fits the quality expectations. Gaps are stack-specific rather than fundamental: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest, and Kotlin is absent, though Java and broad polyglot experience suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js + React experience at product companies
Current AI-agent and MCP development experience, a required and rare skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test tooling)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
No Kotlin, and significant career time in D-lang rather than the core stack
Frontend depth is Ember-heavy; React exposure appears more recent and narrower

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
